FROM
$$NRTACCUMVWDB.QTC_CP_TRNSACTIN_ATRIBUTS
WHERE   SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME > '$$LastExtractDate' 
AND   SOURCE_DML_TYPE <> 'DELETE'
QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY QTC_CP_TRNSACTIN_ATRIBUTS.ATTRIBUTE_ID ORDER BY   REFRESH_DATETIME DESC) = 1
